creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Created attachment 257999
0.9.3: bug fixes only

I decided to create an attachment that contains 0.9.3 bug fixes only -- no new features. It patches bugs 1-11 from my original list, except 6 and 9, and the new bug below. If you decide to adopt these changes, I recommend calling the result 0.9.4.

Today I encountered something I consider another bug: Generally, if parsing of a date fails, calendar just skips it and continues on, and -d will say "Failed!".  However, when the code that parses offsets sees anything it doesn't like in the date (e.g., "-2x"), calendar 0.9.3 EXITS! The patch in the attachment makes indextooffset() return (failed) instead of exiting.

I expect to post an update regarding 2025.1 soon.
